item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]

item.title: MicroMania Midget Wrestling: Fostoria, OH at Venue 18 - 06/18/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/05/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 11295 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA MicroMania Midget Wrestling returns to Venue 18 on Thursday June 18th, 2026 in Fostoria,OH
item.dc:creator: MicroMania Midget Wrestling Tour
item.yodel:media_alt_text: MicroMania Midget Wrestling: Fostoria, OH at Venue 18 on Jun 18, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and fostoria.

item.title: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 - 06/21/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/28/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 79 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Save the dates for Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026! Get ready to celebrate the flavors of the season with Taste of Summer Seneca County, returning June 21 to 28, 2026! This weeklong culinary event invites locals and visitors to explore limited-time, summer-inspired specials from restaurants, cafés, bakeries, bars, food trucks, and more across the county. From refreshing drinks to seasonal dishes and sweet treats, Taste of Summer highlights the delicious diversity of Seneca County’s food scene while encouraging guests to visit new places and support local businesses. The more locations your support, the more prizes you'll win! Details on prized and locations coming soon, stay tuned!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 on Jun 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include food scene and local businesses.

item.title: Seneca County Safety Council | June Meeting - 06/23/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/23/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the Seneca County Safety Council June meeting on June 23, 2026 at 12:00 PM at the North Central Ohio Educational Service Center. This "Best Practices Roundtable: Sharing Success Stories" will give members the chance to highlight what’s working in their safety programs and learn from one another. If you are bringing a guest, please register them no later than June 16 at http://www.SenecaRegionalChamber.com/guest.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca County Safety Council | June Meeting on Jun 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seneca regional chamber and success stories.

item.title: Tom Sawyer Days - 06/23/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/23/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Become Tom Sawyer for the afternoon as we read a short story about his life and then re-enact an adventure.  Dress to get dirty and wet as we will be in the creek.  Old shoes or boots recommended. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tom Sawyer Days on Jun 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Outdoors and adventure.

item.title: Healthy Hike - 06/23/2026 6:30pm EDT to 06/23/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1018 N Water St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a low intensity walking hike on the Storybook Trail at Scheckelhoff Park. We'll meet near the parking area, walk, enjoy some provided snacks, and the walk back. Families welcome! Get some exercises and meet new friends! In case of inclement weather, please check this page
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Healthy Hike on Jun 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include meet new friends and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Summer Hydraulics - 06/24/2026 8:00am UTC to 06/24/2026 4:30pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Length: 24 Hours $2000 per person Course Description: This course is a basic study of the principles of fluid power systems based on industrial applications with hydraulics. A heavy focus is on hydraulic systems, components, assembling circuits and demonstrating the circuits operate correctly. The student will learn how to interpret a hydraulic circuit print and predict the operation of a circuit based on the print. The student will also assemble and troubleshoot the circuits in a controlled lab environment with industrial grade devices. Students will also utilize the simulation software, Automation Studio, to simulate hydraulic circuits in an asynchronous format. The student will also be focusing on safety when working w
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Hydraulics on Jun 24, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fluid power systems and fostoria learning center.

item.title: Canoe and Kayak Float - 06/24/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/24/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Spend the morning with Linda Rose on the pond paddling around and enjoying the sights that nature has to offer.  Canoes, kayaks, paddles and life jackets are provided.  Registration is required as there is a limited number of canoes and kayaks.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Canoe and Kayak Float on Jun 24, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include canoe and kayak.

item.title: Chamber & Development Chat and Assist | June 2026 - 06/24/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/24/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA We've opened the doors to provide a better member experience for our chamber & development members and to help you get the most of your membership, ask questions, and get help to elevate your business! Chamber & Development Chat and Assist is an opportunity for our members to meet one on one with a Chamber & Development team member to understand and take advantage everything that comes with their membership, the opportunity to get help with anything from social media tips to Canva crash courses and beyond, to providing feedback to us so we can get better! Upcoming 2026 Chat & Assist dates include: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, August 26, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, September 23, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM Wednesday, October 28, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM You can secure a time (this is just so we know who to expect and how to best prepare!) at https://calendar.google.com/calendar/appointments/schedules/AcZssZ2Jz5jSs5OdbQ7h4VKhoLDPFhqgu-Mn_BQMaOLPCjqaRAYRVH5g0-KWk20-vt5tHmtF304_kzc6.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Chamber & Development Chat and Assist | June 2026 on Jun 24, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include business support and canva courses.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 06/24/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/24/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, June 3, 10, 17, and 24 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on June 3, June 10, and June 17 with books, songs and lap bounces. On June 24, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jun 24, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include story time and summer reading program.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/24/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/24/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 24, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include local businesses and seasonal.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/24/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/24/2026 4:00pm EDT

Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: 2p | Teen Adventure Movie & Craft - 06/24/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/24/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2p | Teen Adventure Movie & Craft on Jun 24, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Hobbies and adventure.

item.title: Teen Adventure Craft & Movie - 06/24/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/24/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Teen Adventure Movie & Craft” for teens entering grades six through twelve on Wednesday, June 24 from 2:00 to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Join us for a dinosaur adventure movie-inspired program where teens will watch a movie and customize their own hats using patches and fabric markers. Craft supplies will be provided. Please note that the movie is PG-13.This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, call 419-447-3751 or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Adventure Craft & Movie on Jun 24, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer reading program and teen adventure.

item.title: Redmen Club Meeting - 06/24/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/24/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1001 Park Ave, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Hi everyone, It’s that time of the month again! Just a quick reminder of our monthly Redmen Club meeting. Where: FJSHS Cafeteria We have a few exciting updates to share and upcoming plans to map out, so your voice and ideas are highly valued. Hope to see you all there!
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Redmen Club
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Redmen Club Meeting on Jun 24, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include participation and redmen club meeting.

item.title: Summer Hydraulics - 06/25/2026 8:00am UTC to 06/25/2026 4:30pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Length: 24 Hours $2000 per person Course Description: This course is a basic study of the principles of fluid power systems based on industrial applications with hydraulics. A heavy focus is on hydraulic systems, components, assembling circuits and demonstrating the circuits operate correctly. The student will learn how to interpret a hydraulic circuit print and predict the operation of a circuit based on the print. The student will also assemble and troubleshoot the circuits in a controlled lab environment with industrial grade devices. Students will also utilize the simulation software, Automation Studio, to simulate hydraulic circuits in an asynchronous format. The student will also be focusing on safety when working w
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | Big Lots - 06/25/2026 8:45am EDT to 06/25/2026 9:45am EDT
item.description: Location : 644 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | Big Lots on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seneca regional chamber and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Preschool Pals—Wonderful Worms - 06/25/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/25/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Mercy Community Nature Preserve, 99 St Lawrence Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA For ages 3 to 5 years.  Join Linda Rose as we take a walk along the trails looking under logs and rocks for worms.  Learn all about their anatomy and benefits as you examine what you find. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Preschool Pals—Wonderful Worms on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include anatomy and preschool pals.

item.title: The World's Largest Swimming Lesson - 06/25/2026 10:15am EDT to 06/25/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 180 Summit St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Drowning is fast, silent, and preventable. Join us at the Tiffin Community YMCA on June 25th for the World's Largest Swimming Lesson. We're building water competency and confidence, one lesson at at time. Register now! A free 30 minute swim lesson- three sessions to choose from. Secure your spot today!
item.dc:creator: YMCA of Bucyrus-Tiffin, Inc
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The World's Largest Swimming Lesson on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free and pool.

item.title: "Creepy Crawlers" - Imagination Station's Workshop on Wheels - 06/25/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/25/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Imagination Station is bringing their "Creepy Crawlers" Workshop to us! Learn why bugs and worms are so important to our world. Elementary Programs are designed for children going into Kindergarten through 5th Grade.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Creepy Crawlers" - Imagination Station's Workshop on Wheels on Jun 25, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include imagination station and kindergarten through 5th grade.

item.title: Saving and Budgeting Lunch & Learn - 06/25/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 12:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 300 North St, Bellevue, OH 44811, USA Want to feel more in control of your finances? Join Kara Missig, Learning & Development Specialist, for a virtual Lunch & Learn focused on budgeting and saving strategies that can help you reach your financial goals. June 25, 2026 12:00 – 12:30 p.m. Whether you're looking to build an emergency fund, reduce financial stress, or simply make your money work harder, Kara will share helpful tips, tools, and techniques you can start using right away. Bring your lunch and your questions for this informative session!
item.dc:creator: Firelands Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Saving and Budgeting Lunch & Learn on Jun 25, 2026 in Bellevue, OH. Featured themes include financial education and online.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/25/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Washington Street Outfitters
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family activities and interactive experience.

item.title: Teen Art Club - 06/25/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Teen Art Club at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursdays, June 11 and 25, from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Junior Home Room. This event invites teens in grades 6 through 12 to unleash their creativity alongside fellow art enthusiasts. Participants can bring their own drawings and projects or explore new ones, as the Library provides various craft supplies and guidance on arts and crafts skills. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more details, visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Art Club on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include craft supplies and creativity.

item.title: Sprout Science: Underground Animal Safari - 06/25/2026 3:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursday, June 25 at 3:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room for "Sprout Science: Underground Animal Safari." This engaging and interactive program invites participants to discover the fascinating world of underground animals, from burrowing mammals to tunneling insects. It is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program theme “Unearth a Story.” For additional information, visit the Youth Services Department or call (419) 447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Sprout Science: Underground Animal Safari on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include underground animal safari and youth services department.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | Xcaret Mexican Restaurant - 06/25/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 870 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | Xcaret Mexican Restaurant on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and xcaret mexican restaurant.

item.title: Family Movie Night - 06/25/2026 5:30pm EDT to 06/25/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for Family Movie Night! Bring your dinner, favorite blanket or camp chair & get comfy! Folding chair seating and popcorn provided! Call the library at 419-426-3825 to find out what is playing.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Movie Night on Jun 25, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include family movie night and popcorn.

item.title: Revolutionary War Veterans of Seneca County - 06/25/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursday, June 25 at 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room for the program "Revolutionary War Veterans of Seneca County." Led by Local History and Genealogy Specialist Jessica Hoehn, this engaging presentation explores the stories of Revolutionary War veterans who settled in Seneca County, highlighting their service, journeys, and lasting impacts on the local community. This free program is open to all adults and is part of T-SPL’s America 250 celebration. For more information, call (419) 447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Revolutionary War Veterans of Seneca County on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include genealogy specialist and local history.

item.title: Seneca Proud Book Club - 06/25/2026 6:30pm EDT to 06/25/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 137 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Book club is open to everyone, even if you haven't finished reading the book yet. Books are available at Pan Yan Bookstore in downtown Tiffin and also through the public library.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca Proud Book Club on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Clubs and book club.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 06/25/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Park & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Parks & Rec and community involvement.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 06/25/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/25/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jun 25, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and Parks & Rec.

item.title: LIFEGUARDING - 06/26/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/28/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 180 Summit St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Ready to make a difference this summer? 🌊☀️

Become a certified lifeguard and gain the skills to save lives, build confidence, and become a leader!

Important Details:

JUNE 26-28, 2026

Friday 4p-8p, Saturday 8a-5p, & Sunday 8a-5p

• Blended course format – 7 hours of online coursework must be completed before the first day of class

• Swim assessment required one week prior to the first class- Friday at 6pm

• Attendance is mandatory for all scheduled days (no make-up sessions)

• Registration closes one week before the class begins

• Limited to just 8 students per class – reserve your spot early!

Don’t wait—spots fill fast! 📅 Enroll now at the Tiffin Community YMCA and dive into a new opportunity!
item.dc:creator: YMCA of Bucyrus-Tiffin, Inc
item.yodel:media_alt_text: LIFEGUARDING on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. This is an all-day event with themes including job and lifeguard.

item.title: HOUSTON WE HAVE A PROBLEM - 06/26/2026 12:30am EDT to 06/26/2026 2:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get up close and personal with the signs and symptoms of Alzheimer's with Mary Lee Creeger. Please call AEC to sign up (419) 448-9774.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: HOUSTON WE HAVE A PROBLEM on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Health & Fitness.

item.title: St. Joseph Festival General Store - 06/26/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/27/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 36 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA June 26 | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM June 27 | 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM St. Joseph Activity Center, 36 Melmore St., Tiffin, OH Get ready to shop 'til you drop! Join us for the St. Joseph Festival General Store — a two-day event packed with treasures, treats, and great finds! Browse a huge selection of household items, decor, books, toys, and more. You never know what hidden gems you'll discover! All proceeds help support St. Joseph Parish and the St. Joseph Festival. Come early for the best selection — and don’t forget to bring a friend. We can’t wait to see you there!
item.dc:creator: St. Joseph Catholic Church
item.yodel:media_alt_text: St. Joseph Festival General Store on Jun 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include st joseph festival and st. joseph festival general store.
